subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! How can I make mention of Thee when the heart of 'Abdu'l-Bahá is consumed by the flames of yearning and the fire of ardent love? [3.5s]... ...O Lord!  My bones are weakened, and the hoar hairs glisten on My head ... and I have now reached old age, failing in My powers
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی کیف اذکرک و قلب عبدالبهاء تتاجج فیهه نار الجوی و نیران الاسنی من
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God, @prayer for the departed
